description_long: This axe features a striking design with a large, jagged, double-edged blade made of metallic material, attached to a robust handle. The head of the axe is adorned with a sculpted skull motif, giving it a menacing and decorative appearance. The blade is asymmetrical, with one side larger and more pronounced, and both edges appear chipped and rugged, suggesting heavy use or intentional stylization. The handle is dark, straight, and reinforced with metallic bands and bolts, ending in a hooked pommel. The overall construction appears solid and heavy, suitable for both display and functional use. The color palette is dominated by shades of gray and bone, enhancing its intimidating and gothic aesthetic.
description: A heavy, double-edged axe with a skull motif, jagged metallic blades, and a reinforced dark handle with bolts and a hooked pommel.
description_view_0: Front view shows the skull motif head-on, with the blade edges extending to the sides and the handle extending downward.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the asymmetrical, jagged blade and the detailed skull motif, with visible bolts and handle reinforcement.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the skull motif and the narrow profile of the blade, with the handle and pommel visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the other edge of the blade, the skull motif in profile, and the handle's construction details.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, dark wood handle reinforced with metal bands and bolts, ending in a hooked pommel; round cross-section with a rugged grip.
attribute_blade_design: Large, double-edged, asymmetrical blade with jagged, chipped edges; features a prominent skull motif at the head and decorative bolts.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional mounting with visible bolts and metal bands securing the blade to the handle.
